turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Hello, mera naam Vikram Shetty hai. Main puchna chahta hoon ki Medi Assist TPA mein mere appendix ke operation ka coverage milega?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Haan Mr. Shetty, Medi Assist hamare empanelled TPAs mein se ek hai. Appendectomy generally covered hoti hai surgical policies mein.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Hum cashless facility provide karte hain Medi Assist ke liye. Aapko bas admission se pehle pre-auth leni hogi. Iske liye surgeon ka estimate aur current reports chahiye honge.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Aur room rent ka kya — koi limit hai?

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Room rent limits aapki specific policy par depend karti hain. Yeh detail aapke insurance card ya policy document mein hogi. Admission ke waqt humare TPA desk wale exact covered amount bata sakte hain.

turns.speaker: caller
turns.text: Theek hai samajh gaya. Bahut helpful tha, thank you.

turns.speaker: agent
turns.text: Bahut shukriya Mr. Shetty. Jaldi se theek ho jaayein!
